title: Kellie Strom
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Mediacat|imagecat=Images by Kellie Strom}}
'''Kellie Strom''' was the penciller for the comic "[[Fortune, Fate, and the Natural History of the Sarlacc]]" that appeared in ''[[Star Wars Tales 6]]'' and was reprinted in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 2]]''
